scientific_integrity_rule: This readiness package links final split, feature and manifest-level leakage sources to the required final comparator output manifest contract. It does not execute final comparators, write logits or metrics, promote smoke artifacts, audit runtime comparator logs, or authorize claims.

comparator_runtime_boundaries.A2: Final A2 inference must be scalp-only. No privileged, teacher or outer-test fit information may enter any fit step.
comparator_runtime_boundaries.A2b: Final A2b inference must be scalp-only. No privileged, teacher or outer-test fit information may enter any fit step.
comparator_runtime_boundaries.A2c_CORAL: Final A2c CORAL alignment statistics must be fit on training subjects only; test-time inference remains scalp-only.
comparator_runtime_boundaries.A2d_riemannian: Final A2d Riemannian/tangent references must be fit on training subjects only; test-time inference remains scalp-only.
comparator_runtime_boundaries.A3_distillation: Final A3 teacher outputs may be generated for training rows only; teacher outputs are not allowed at test-time inference.
comparator_runtime_boundaries.A4_privileged: Final A4 privileged/iEEG or teacher-side information may be used only during training; test-time inference must be scalp-only.
